sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26395" key="di/guios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δί-γυιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">γυῖον</etym>) <sense id="n26395.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of two members,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mart.</author> </bibl> Ca<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.9.989</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">990</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n26395.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> as expl. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διάγυιος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:1:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
